rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EMILA DI FRANCO GLESSI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Amy Harrington, Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel is granted without prejudice to Mr. Muschi's bringing a motion for a protective order. The parties are to meet and confer in person within five days of this order before any additional motions are filed. The prevailing party must prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than January 20, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
